summary: Frontend-only testing of Sativo Studios marketing site completed. All critical flows pass: page load, hero/sections rendering, nav smooth-scroll (Work/About/Contact), portfolio hover overlays (work-1 & work-2), contact form validation, Gmail URL (mail.google.com/mail with to=sativostudios@gmail.com), WhatsApp URL (wa.me/919061673057), and mobile (375px) / desktop (1920px) responsiveness. No console errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx buildBody/buildText double-encodes values: encodeURIComponent is applied to each field but they are embedded inside a string that also contains already-percent-encoded '%0A' newlines and raw spaces. Spaces end up as literal ' ' in the final URL (not %20) - some clients may accept it but strict URL parsers may not. Consider building the string plainly and wrapping the entire body in encodeURIComponent once.
Portfolio.jsx onTouchStart toggles hover but there is no way to dismiss on touch devices after a second card is tapped - both overlays can remain open; consider closing others on touch.
No ErrorBoundary around routed tree; any runtime error in Hero/Portfolio would crash the whole app.
Hero SERVICES_PARAGRAPH is a single paragraph (confirmed - no bullets) per spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is fully working. Contact form opens external Gmail/WhatsApp via window.open - to verify URLs, intercept window.open (page.evaluate override) rather than relying on popup's final URL because Gmail redirects unauthenticated users to accounts.google.com with the original URL in the `continue=` param. All expected data-testid attributes present.
